The '''Oseon sun''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] in the [[Oseon system/Legends|Oseon system]]. Every [[Standard year/Legends|standard year]], it released the [[Flamewind of Oseon/Legends|Flamewind]] that was a major tourist attraction in the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. [[Wiorkettle]] and [[Treva Horme]], of [[Planet Dreams, Incorporated|Planet Dreams, Inc]] had a chain in the Oseon.

{{Star-stub}}
